label: KDouble
description: This extension for Karoo allows to use custom fields with double types (HR,Power,etc). Includes vertical and horizontal layout, smart fields, rolling fields, W prime, FTP and bell option
releaseNotes: Improve performance. Improve FA fields. Improve performance. Fix lack in climber field. If you're app is < 3.4.0 you need to uninstall and install again. Please, write your current conf.
